## ⚠️ IMPORTANT

**Do NOT disclose security vulnerabilities publicly!**

- Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting (Security tab → "Report a vulnerability"), or
- Email security@chioma.dev instead
- See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the full responsible-disclosure policy

If you're filling this template out, please stop and use one of the private channels above instead — this public template exists mainly so accidental disclosures get redirected quickly.
